---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("data/gaData.csv")
```

```{r}
data$date <- as.Date(data$date)
```

```{r}
summary(data$date)
```

```{r}
sum(data$visitsTumblr)
```

```{r}
sum(data$visitsTumblr > 0)
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(format(date, "%Y") == "2012") %>% summarise(visit_sum = sum(visitsTumblr))
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(weekdays(date)) %>% summarise(visit_sum = sum(visitsTumblr)) %>% arrange(desc(visit_sum))
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(month = format(date, "%Y-%m")) %>% summarise(visit_sum = sum(visitsTumblr)) %>% arrange(desc(visit_sum))
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(date) %>%summarise(visit_sum = sum(visitsTumblr)) %>% arrange(desc(visit_sum))
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(year = format(date, "%Y")) %>% summarise(day_count = n())
```
